layout.siteTitle: Fabian Montoya | Full Stack Developer & RPA Engineer
layout.siteDescription: Fabian Montoya's Portfolio - Full Stack Developer and RPA Engineer in Nicaragua. Specialized in React, Angular, TypeScript, Node.js and automation solutions.

presentation.tagline: I design, develop and implement IT solutions that enable companies to evolve.

hero.headline: Turning ideas into extraordinary digital
hero.description1: As a systems engineer with a passion for full stack development, I specialize in creating technological solutions that transform the way companies connect with their users.
hero.description2: From elegant commercial platforms to complex inventory and billing systems, each project is an opportunity to innovate.
